headline: Mary Dillon Joins American Airlines Board As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: American Airlines Group has elected Mary Dillon to its board of directors. Dillon brings leadership experience from Foot Locker, Ulta Beauty, and U.S. Cellular. The appointment adds consumer and retail expertise to the board of NasdaqGS:AAL. For investors watching NasdaqGS:AAL, this leadership change comes as the stock trades at $10.71 and has seen a 30.8% decline year to date and a 55.1% decline over five years. The share price performance highlights how closely the market is watching...

headline: Italy investigates Sephora and Benefit over skincare marketing to children
summary: Italy's competition authority said the LVMH-owned cosmetic brands Sephora and Benefit used an "insidious marketing strategy" to appeal to tween consumers.
